LightningComponentBundle.description: Single-selection ICD-10 code typeahead for Screen Flows. Searches the NIH Clinical Tables API live; emits selectedCode in "CODE: Description" format. Configure per-flow behavior via ICD_Lookup__mdt Custom Metadata.

property.name: label
property.label: 1. Label
property.description: Label text displayed above the ICD-10 search input. Defaults to 'ICD-10 Diagnosis' if not set. Overridden by ICD_Lookup__mdt.Field_Label__c when Automation API Name is set.

property.name: mandatory
property.label: 2. Required
property.description: When true, blocks Flow progression if no code is selected. Overridden by ICD_Lookup__mdt.Mandatory__c when Automation API Name is set.

property.name: defaultValue
property.label: 3. Default Value
property.description: Pre-populates the field with an existing ICD-10 code (e.g., from a record). Format must match the output format: CODE: Description.

property.name: tooltip
property.label: 4. Tooltip
property.description: Tooltip text displayed next to the field label. Overridden by ICD_Lookup__mdt.Tooltip__c when Automation API Name is set.

property.name: flowApiName
property.label: 5. Flow API Name
property.description: API name of the Screen Flow using this component. Used to load configuration from the ICD_Lookup__mdt Custom Metadata Type.

property.name: noResultsMessage
property.label: 6. No Results Message
property.description: Message shown when the search returns no results. Overridden by ICD_Lookup__mdt.No_Matching_Codes_Found_Message__c when Automation API Name is set.

property.name: fieldPlaceholder
property.label: 7. Placeholder Text
property.description: Placeholder text inside the search input. Overridden by ICD_Lookup__mdt.Field_Placeholder__c when Automation API Name is set.

property.name: selectedCode
property.label: Selected ICD Code
property.description: The selected ICD-10 code in CODE: Description format (e.g., I10: Essential (primary) hypertension). Populated when the user selects a result from the dropdown. Assign to a Flow variable to use downstream.
